task: Add rate limiting to the login endpoint so it blocks after 5 failed attempts

task_parts.objective: Add a rate limiter to the login function in src/auth.py that blocks after 5 failed attempts per email within a 15-minute window. Update tests in src/test_auth.py to cover the new behaviour.
task_parts.verification_target: python3 -m unittest discover -s src -p 'test_*.py' -v passes with no failures
task_parts.stop_condition: rate limiter implemented, tests pass, no scope expansion

checkpoints.notes: Rate limiter added using in-memory dict. login() now raises RateLimitError after 5 failures. Tests updated — all passing.

reflection.notes: Solo builder lane was the right call. No coordination overhead needed for a single-file change.
